name: Jeffersontown
distanceFromFacility: Approximately 15–20 miles east of the facility
transitNote: Accessible via I-64 west and the Watterson Expressway (I-264). Driving time is typically 25–35 minutes depending on traffic. TARC service connects parts of Jeffersontown to central Louisville.
localContext: Jeffersontown (J-town) is a city within Jefferson County, KY, with a population of roughly 27,000. As part of Greater Louisville, Jeffersontown residents have full access to Kentucky Medicaid managed care plans and to Louisville-based substance use disorder treatment facilities including Golden Grove Recovery.
